messages.content: I need to find a place to stay.
The Sleeping Dragon on Silver Street. Clean beds, decent ale. Tell 'em Voss sent you — they'll give you the guard's discount. Don't cause trouble there or anywhere else.
Tell me about the city guards.

We've got fifty guards total. Twenty on the wall, fifteen on patrol, ten at the gates, five in the cells. We're underpaid, overworked, and the only thing between this city and chaos. And you're wasting my time.
